code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best_start = 0
  mut best_len = 0
  mut word_start = 0
  mut in_word = false
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          is_end = true
        end
      when None
        is_end = true
      end
    end
    if is_end
      if in_word
        let wlen = i - word_start
        if wlen > best_len
          best_len = wlen
          best_start = word_start
        end
        in_word = false
      end
    else
      if not in_word
        in_word = true
        word_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  println("longest=#{word}")
when None
  println("longest=")
end
